case_title: KYLE WASHBURN VS. OLAF ELZE et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT OLAF ELZA WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WASHBURN, KYLE AS TO DEFENDANT ELZE, OLAF ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WASHBURN, KYLE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED JAN-23-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO LLC
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO OLAF ELZE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-09-2012 AT 3:30PM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WASHBURN, KYLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO LLC PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST OLAF ELZE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 - SERVED JAN-13-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ELZE, OLAF
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
